author: cursor-agent

patch.value: Implement regression tests that protect existing users during terminal hardening rollout.
T4: Add terminal compatibility regression coverage
Extend unit and integration tests for stdin fail-fast behavior, exit-code stability, and terminal-neutral output/runtime contracts.
New unit/integration tests cover interactive stdin misuse handling, exit-code behavior, and linked-test runtime diagnostics without breaking existing suites.
Feature pm-t6f7 accepted and target test files identified.
Behavior changes in stdin/exit/subprocess paths need direct regression protection.
